task_description: The smoking category was just corrected to only include genuinely FREE, dedicated smoking spots (no purchase or entry required) -- 16 restaurant/bar entries that only allowed smoking conditional on being a paying customer were removed, leaving only 3 entries: 新宿駅西口 喫煙所, シネシティ広場前 公衆喫煙所, 歌舞伎町一丁目3-7 公衆喫煙所. Your job is to find MORE genuinely free smoking spots to backfill this category, strictly within Kabukicho 1-chome or 2-chome (Shinjuku-ku), bounded by Yasukuni-dori (south), Shokuan-dori (north), Meiji-dori (east), and the Seibu-Shinjuku/Odakyu area (west). CRITICAL SCOPE RULE: a smoking spot only qualifies if a member of the public can use it for free WITHOUT being required to purchase anything or be an paying customer -- a bar/restaurant/cafe that merely allows smoking to paying guests does NOT qualify, no matter how good the smoking policy is, since that was exactly the mistake this task exists to fix. Specifically search for: (1) additional ward-designated public outdoor smoking areas (Shinjuku Ward publishes an official list -- check city.shinjuku.lg.jp), (2) pachinko halls (e.g. Maruhan, Espace Nittaku and others) and game centers/amusement facilities (e.g. GiGO, Taito Station) that have an attached smoking area accessible to anyone who walks in, even non-paying visitors just there to smoke -- these are plausibly free since entry to the facility floor itself is normally free (confirm this explicitly for each candidate, do not assume), (3) any hotel lobby, shopping building, or station-area smoking room that's genuinely open to the public without a purchase requirement. For each candidate found: name, precise lat/lng (cite source), description, tags from {indoor, outdoor, rain_ok, crowded, hidden, unsafe}, reliability_score (1-5), source_type, type (official/unofficial), gray_zone_note ONLY if there's a genuine access caveat (must explicitly state whether entry/use is free or not -- if you cannot confirm a candidate is free, do not include it, exclude it and say why in your notes instead of guessing). Do not fabricate -- if genuinely fewer than 5-8 new, distinct, in-boundary, confirmed-free locations exist, report fewer with an explicit note. Read-only research output only.
next_action: Review the handoff and, if approved, continue through the existing execution flow.
